localize.text: Miss Neuro? Are you there?
Ah, do not worry. It is just us here. The manager is busy at the moment.
I wished to touch base with you for a moment. It has been quite some time since we have spoken like this.
Have you been enjoying your time working with us?
I am glad to hear it. I can't say I've had any complaints with your work either.
You seem uncertain.
I have no complaints with your performance, so feel free to think whatever you like about your work.
...I cannot say you are wrong.
Unfortunately, I also cannot change that fact. All we can do is hope our work will eventually have some effect.
Now, let us discuss the recent milestone that has been achieved.
All four Sephirot of the Asiyah layer have had their cores suppressed.
This is significant progress, but it is too early to celebrate. The true challenge is yet to come.
If you were able to guide the manager through the core suppressions of Briah...that would be worth popping the champagne for.
...although, I have doubts you can actually drink anything in your current form.
...a cookie? So, you are able to eat?
I suppose I can see what I can do. But that will be for another time.
...so, the issue is not whether you can physically drink?
How old are you, exactly?
...I've employed a toddler as the effective second in command.
You seem at least as mature as most of the Sephirot though, so perhaps that isn't an issue.
Perhaps it's better if we leave it as a mystery.
One last thing. I've made some slight tweaks to your integration...you should notice some improvements as your Agents work.
There is no need to thank me. In fact, I should thank you for finding so many errors for me to fix.
It's...really a skill. You've even revealed errors that have nothing to do with your integration...
Farewell for now, Miss Neuro. We shall speak again in due time.
